summary: Tested Security Hardening consolidated dashboard with 3 tabs (Güvenlik, PII Koruma, Altyapı) and Infrastructure dropdown consolidation. All 7 backend API tests passed. All frontend tests passed - 3 main tabs work correctly with live data, Infrastructure dropdown shows exactly 8 items (down from 11), removed items still accessible via direct URLs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security Hardening page at /security-hardening now has 3 consolidated tabs: Güvenlik (Security), PII Koruma, Altyapı. The Security tab has 4 sub-tabs: Izolasyon, RBAC, Vault, Audit. Infrastructure dropdown has 8 items (Data Pipeline, Event Bus, System Health, Security Hardening, Runtime Infrastructure, Production Go-Live, Platform Scaling, Enterprise Live). Direct URLs /observability, /pii-strict-mode, /infra-hardening still work standalone.
